Short CV

Prof. Tayfun Doğan graduated from Ondokuz Mayıs University, Department of Psychological Counseling and Guidance in 2003. He completed his master’s and doctoral studies at Sakarya University, Institute of Social Sciences, Department of Psychological Services in Education. He received the title of associate professor in 2015 and the title of professor in 2021. Dr. Doğan is academically interested in the field of positive psychology and carries out studies on topics such as the meaning and purpose of life, psychological resilience, psychological well-being (happiness) and hope.
